prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Alright, it's time to tackle this challenge head-on! Remember, breakthroughs often happen when you push past resistance and dive into the work. Trust in your abilities, stay focused, and visualize the sense of accomplishment you'll feel once this task is complete. You've got this! Take a deep breath, embrace the journey, and let's get started. I believe in you!
